measurement: HR=0 shotgun per-band magnitude M(B) = landing(B) x bracket(B), measured via damage-counter reconciliation on an HR-clean solo SG unit (guilty), replicating the isabel counter-reconciliation method
focusReason: solo recording - Guilty only unit (all other slots EMPTY on Battle Records); lone Burst II => ZERO full bursts (no FULL BURST splash anywhere in the 1f/8s segment map); S1/S2 are the only kit effects and both are normal-attack-triggered

params.unitFormula: 117887 * 2.314 = 272791 (10-pellet shot total, plain, non-crit non-core, no range)
params.quantumNote: measured q from 185-shot integer-lattice fit (3-pass LSQ, residuals <=0.2% on 184/185, the 1 exception exact at S2-expiry edge); INDEPENDENTLY popup-verified exact: white 53414=13q*1.4818, 51925=13q*1.4405, 41088=10q*1.4818, 39942=10q*1.4405, orange 73958=18q*1.4818, 71896=18q*1.4405, 61632=15q*1.4818, 59913=15q*1.4405, red CORE HIT 91866=23q*1.4405. Same-direction basis elevation as isabel (+2.3%) and brid aux (+1.6%): scope-lock ATK term reads slightly low across SG probes.

clock.method: first-DAMAGE fight clock (isabel convention): fightClock = videoSec - 7.717 (first damage event, counter 0 -> 221,767, at video frame 463 = 7.717s). Band windows on this clock.
clock.timerDriftNote: the top-right countdown runs ~1.5-2s FAST vs video time across the fight (no constant offset satisfies all four anchors). Cause unresolved (VFR recording vs game-clock skips at transitions). Band placement therefore keys to the first-damage clock per the pre-registration; empirical lattice boundaries reported separately.

empiricalBandBoundaries.method: the NEAR range bonus (+0.3/pellet) changes the delta lattice from multiples-of-5 U to non-mult-5 integers -> near windows are directly visible in the data
empiricalBandBoundaries.nearRun1: fightClock 30.17 .. ~64 (definite non-mult-5 fits 30.17-63.57; the 3 shots at 65.87-67.20 are mult-5, P(chance if near)=0.8%)
empiricalBandBoundaries.nearRun2: fightClock 140.22 .. ~170 (definite 140.22-169.27; the 5 tail-magazine shots 173.20-175.87 are all mult-5, P(chance if near)=0.03%)
empiricalBandBoundaries.vsNominal: range script transitions run ~2-4s EARLY vs the nominal first-damage-clock boundaries (33/70->near observed ~30.2; 144->near observed ~140.2; 176->out observed ~170-173); fire-hold gaps (0.9-2.4s, no events, off the 40f pull grid) observed at each transition

method.primary: counter-reconciliation at 60fps: per-frame diff of the top-centre DAMAGE counter ROI (crop 1140,25 352x62 landscape) -> 494 stable states; digit OCR via connected-component clustering (77 clusters) + visual labeling + seed validation (17 hand-read states) -> 455 numeric reads, 0 monotonicity violations, final read = end-screen total EXACT. Distinct-value chain -> 185 damage events.
method.shotCount: 185 events; inter-event gap histogram: 146x exactly 40f (0.667s cadence), reloads exactly 181f (matches reloadFrames 181 frame-exact), 7 close pairs (7-26f) are landing-time jitter with complementary 54-73f gaps (sum ~2x40f), 3 extended transition fire-holds. Merges: none (every event fits a single-shot lattice value). Whiffs: no skipped-pull (80f) gaps anywhere -> zero whiffed pulls outside transition holds.
method.kitFit: R3 (pre-M, per plan): every delta = q x U x f with f = 1 + 0.0881*a + 0.0413*b on the DETERMINISTIC schedule a: attacks 1-6 ->0, 7-12 ->1, 13-18 ->3, 19-24 ->4, 25+ ->5 (S1 every 6 attacks +1, S2 every 12 attacks ALSO +1 'increases stack count of buffs'), b: 1 within 10s of the last 12k-th attack. 184/185 integer-exact; the single exception (fc 144.88) exact at b=0 = damage landed ~0.05s before S2 expiry.
method.bandVerification: boss apparent size/position at spot frames: far (fc 88-95) boss smallest/distant-right; near (fc 50-60, 156) boss large/centred filling frame; mid medium; matches labels.

qG1_S1SoloSelfApplication.question: does guilty's S1 (Duplicate 8.81% ATK of ally with highest ATK, stacks x5, 10s) self-apply solo?
qG1_S1SoloSelfApplication.signature: REFRESH-ALL staircase (per plan R3 taxonomy): step trace rises 1.000 -> 1.0881 (shot 7) -> 1.3056 (shot 13; +2 stacks: S1 six-attack trigger + S2 twelve-attack '+1 stack count' bump, +S2 ATK 4.13%) -> 1.3937 (shot 19) -> plateau 1.4818 (shot 25 onward = 5-stack cap + S2), with b flickering to 0 (1.4405) EXACTLY in the predicted S2 expiry windows (12 attacks span ~12.03s > 10s duration). NO decay across reloads and NO sawtooth anywhere in 160 plateau shots -> refresh-all, not independent-expiry; not flat.
qG1_S1SoloSelfApplication.evidence: 184/185 shots integer-exact on this schedule (residuals <=0.2%); popup values in BOTH b-states exact (e.g. near plain 53414 vs 51925); on-screen buff icon shows stack count '5' at plateau spot frames (green heart icon, fc 51.9/95.3).
qG1_S1SoloSelfApplication.s2StackBumpFinding: S2's 'Increases stack count of buffs by 1' demonstrably bumps S1's stack count (jump from 1 to 3 at attack 12, cap reached by attack 24+12-bump: plateau from shot 25, one trigger earlier than S1-alone would reach 5).

bands.confidenceNote: medium-high: exact fits throughout, but window contains the S1 ramp (buff-corrected by the schedule-exact f) and the mid->near transition occurs ~30.2 (2.8s early) so the last 4 nominal-mid shots are lattice-NEAR
high as a MEASUREMENT (all exact fits, popup-verified); but sits -10% below the 1.281 pre-reg control - see nearControlDeviation
high: 39 exact fits, popup spot-checks L-exact on 3 shots, no cores seen in samples; boundary-stable (0.741-0.760)
medium: nominal window's last shots (140.2-143.55) are lattice-NEAR (boss arrived early) inflating M; boundary-sensitive 0.925-0.974; empirically-clean midfar (106-140) M = see empiricalNote
high as a MEASUREMENT; nominal window includes 5 post-departure mult-5 shots (173.2-175.87) depressing M; empirical window cleaner

L_decomposition.note: L = landed pellets/10-pellet shot from U mod 5 near-lattice (13L+5J+10C); mult-5 U ambiguous -> bounds
L = landed pellets/10-pellet shot from U mod 5 near-lattice (13L+5J+10C); mult-5 U ambiguous -> bounds

ratios.note: guilty PRIMARY form per pre-reg (unless R2 fires - it does not: per-band q spread 0.008%). Buff-corrected M ratios.

totalClosure.note: EXACT to the digit; final counter state (video 183.6s) = Battle Records total; NB the post-fight results screen shows a different 'TOTAL DAMAGE' tile (contact-sheet read ~71.6M) not used - Battle Records per-unit number is the closure target

nearAgreement.vsControl1.281: FAILS the 4% control gate: -10.2%/-12.1% (nominal), -7.2%/-7.6% (empirical) - see nearControlDeviation

shotCountClosure.note: 185 = 20 complete magazines x9 + 5 (last partial); gap grid: 40f pulls + 181f reloads exact; predicted 165-180 (plan) / 190 (pure cadence ceiling); zero whiffed pulls detected - deficits vs ceiling are transition fire-holds (~0.9-2.4s each), not whiffs

stepStability.note: gate <3%: passed by 2.5 orders of magnitude; no ATK drift; S1 duplicate is static (base-ATK snapshot, no compounding)

r1_perBandShotClosure.note: prediction = idealized 40f/181f chain from fc 0 (no transition holds). All shortfalls are localized at band transitions as fire-hold gaps (mid->near1 2.45s hold; far->midfar reload+0.93s; midfar->near2 reload+2.27s; near2->end transition consumed the last 4 pulls of the final magazine). NO whiff story in ANY band: every non-reload gap is 40f or jitter-paired; far band shows NO shot-count deficit beyond its transition hold.

r2_stepAtkPerBand.trigger: fires if any steady band's step differs >2% from near's
r2_stepAtkPerBand.result: NOT fired: per-band q identical to 0.008% (mid 2772.62 lowest - contains the six pre-buff shots with slightly different rounding mix; steady bands 2772.82-2772.84)
r2_stepAtkPerBand.consequence: ratio form remains guilty's PRIMARY read per the pre-registration

r5_boundarySensitivity: per-band minus1.5/plus1.5 M values included in bands[]

r6_popupSpotChecks.impliedComposition: L=2 plain - a genuine 2-pellet near shot

preRegComparison.note: DATA ONLY - no H0/H1 classification (judge decides per pre-registration).
preRegComparison.nearControlDeviation: guilty near reads ~1.13-1.19 vs the 1.281 control: -7% (empirical windows) to -12% (nominal windows) => the pre-registered >4% NEAR-control trigger FIRES. However the deviation is mechanically decomposed: q (ATK basis) is popup-verified EXACT (+1.65% vs nominal, same direction as isabel), kit factor f is schedule-exact, and the near-lattice L decomposition shows a real landed-pellet deficit (mean L ~7.9-8.2 of 10, mode 9, with direct popup-counted examples L=2,6,8,9,10) rather than any ATK/kit confound. Whether this voids guilty's range bands per H-alt-B or re-frames near landing as unit-specific is for the judge.

tailExcluded.note: last damage event at fightClock 175.87; the final magazine's remaining pulls fall in the near2->midfar transition hold and the fight ends during the final reload; counter fades (unread near-empty ROI states) - no damage after 175.87. Total closure unaffected.

note: MEASUREMENT ONLY - no engine/override edits, no verdicts. Per-event log: events.json (same directory).
